exact_preregistered_wording: Recorded suspect sex is not associated with enforcement decisions among incidents with comparable pre-decision evidence and circumstances.
primary_estimand: P(adverse enforcement | comparable event-party pre-decision facts)
required_denominator: all qualifying domestic-related event-parties, including no-arrest and no-report-only events
available_public_evidence: CBI aggregate offender/victim sex tables and Boulder PD public call disposition labels provide descriptive context only.
missing_fields: party sex/gender, suspect/victim/caller roles, pre-decision evidence, relationship, injury, weapons, scene presence, probable-cause facts, outcome by party
request_targets: Boulder PD, BCSO, Longmont, Lafayette, Louisville, Erie, CUPD, Boulder County Communications

exact_preregistered_wording: The share of male suspects changes materially at one or more funnel transitions.
primary_estimand: change in recorded male share across suspect, arrest, referral, filing, conviction, and sentence stages
required_denominator: stage-specific linked counts from call/event-party through court disposition
available_public_evidence: CBI public aggregate tables show male majority among known related offenders; no public linked funnel denominator is available.
missing_fields: stable person/case join keys, arrest/referral/filing/count/disposition/sentence by recorded sex
request_targets: all law-enforcement agencies, Twentieth Judicial District Attorney, Colorado Judicial Branch, municipal courts
current_answer: public data support only descriptive male-majority context, not funnel-transition testing

exact_preregistered_wording: Male suspects have a different adjusted probability of arrest or sole-aggressor designation after conditioning only on facts available before the police decision.
primary_estimand: adjusted risk difference in arrest or sole-aggressor designation by recorded suspect sex
required_denominator: all qualifying event-parties with pre-decision facts
available_public_evidence: none sufficient; public calls lack party sex/gender and legally relevant facts
missing_fields: party sex/gender, probable cause, injury, conduct, self-defense, opposing complaints, prior calls, protection orders, witnesses, officer decision

exact_preregistered_wording: In opposing-complaint or bidirectional incidents, the within-incident probability of being the sole arrested party differs by recorded sex.
primary_estimand: within-incident probability of sole arrest among opposing-complaint/bidirectional incidents
required_denominator: incidents with opposing complaints or independently codable bidirectional conduct
available_public_evidence: none sufficient; public layers do not identify opposing complaints or party-specific conduct
missing_fields: opposing complaints, party-specific allegations/evidence, statutory predominant-aggressor factors, arrest outcome by party

exact_preregistered_wording: Investigation-completeness items differ by suspect or alleged-victim sex after accounting for feasibility and relevance.
primary_estimand: item-level and index-level investigation-completeness differences by recorded sex/dyad
required_denominator: all relevant and feasible investigative-action opportunities in sampled records
available_public_evidence: Boulder investigations-unit audit verifies process failures in a 46-case cohort but does not provide sex/dyad or full denominator.
missing_fields: separate interviews, photos, 911/bodycam review, protection-order checks, self-defense review, witnesses, feasibility, recorded sex/gender

exact_preregistered_wording: Independently coded civil-only incidents involving male potential suspects have a different probability of criminal classification, DV designation, arrest, or referral.
primary_estimand: P(criminal/DV escalation | independently rated civil-only event) by potential suspect sex
available_public_evidence: none sufficient; public labels cannot establish civil-only status or sex.
missing_fields: narratives/evidence, legal-panel civil-only classification, sex/gender, criminal/DV classification, arrest/referral
request_targets: law-enforcement agencies and legal-review sample records

exact_preregistered_wording: Independently coded probable-cause incidents involving female potential suspects have a different probability of report-only or civil disposition.
primary_estimand: P(report-only or civil disposition | independently rated probable-cause event) by potential suspect sex
available_public_evidence: none sufficient; public labels cannot establish probable cause or sex.
missing_fields: narratives/evidence, legal-panel probable-cause classification, sex/gender, report-only/civil/no-enforcement outcomes
request_targets: law-enforcement agencies and legal-review sample records

exact_preregistered_wording: DA filing, count retention, dismissal, plea, conviction, and sentence differ by recorded defendant sex after stage-appropriate adjustment.
primary_estimand: stage-specific DA/court outcome differences by recorded defendant sex
required_denominator: all referred/filed/resolved DV-related counts with sex/gender and stage outcomes
available_public_evidence: public DA dashboard notes identify limits; docket proof of concept is not a count-level extract
missing_fields: Action extract, count-level original/amended/final charges, no-file/dismissal reasons, pleas, convictions, sentences, treatment
request_targets: Twentieth Judicial District Attorney, Colorado Judicial Branch, municipal courts

exact_preregistered_wording: Agency-specific adjusted disparities differ across Boulder County agencies.
primary_estimand: heterogeneity of adjusted disparities across Boulder County agencies
available_public_evidence: Boulder PD public calls available; comparable agency case-level data are absent
missing_fields: agency-specific CAD/RMS schemas, sex/gender, pre-decision facts, outcomes

exact_preregistered_wording: Boulder County estimates differ from matched Colorado agencies after case-mix and data-completeness adjustment.
required_denominator: matched Colorado agency incident-level cohorts with comparable fields
available_public_evidence: CBI all-county rate ranks provide aggregate context only
missing_fields: comparison-agency case-level fields and data-completeness metrics
request_targets: CBI and empirically selected comparison agencies after matching frame is finalized

exact_preregistered_wording: Reporting party, caller, scene-presence, and police-contact selection differ across sex and dyad categories, making arrest-only comparisons materially biased.
primary_estimand: sex/dyad differences in reporting, caller, and scene-presence selection
required_denominator: calls/events with caller role/sex, reporting role/sex, scene presence, and outcomes
available_public_evidence: public calls lack caller sex/role and party scene presence
missing_fields: caller role, caller sex/gender, reporting party, party presence, nonresponse/no-report outcomes
request_targets: Boulder County Communications and agency CAD/RMS custodians

exact_preregistered_wording: Verified policy or training changes alter investigation completeness or enforcement patterns.
primary_estimand: policy/training change effect on investigation completeness or enforcement patterns
minimum_unit: event or investigative item over time
required_denominator: pre/post cohorts around verified implementation dates with stable measurement
available_public_evidence: December 2022 Boulder case-management reform is verified, but post-reform item-level completeness data are absent
missing_fields: policy versions, implementation dates, training records, pre/post case-level completeness outcomes
request_targets: Boulder PD and other agency policy/training custodians

exact_preregistered_wording: Officer, supervisor, prosecutor, agency, and year effects account for meaningful heterogeneity.
primary_estimand: variance and clustering by officer, supervisor, prosecutor, agency, and year
required_denominator: case-level cohorts with pseudonymous actor IDs and outcomes
missing_fields: pseudonymous officer, supervisor, prosecutor, judge IDs; linked outcomes; disclosure controls

exact_preregistered_wording: Results differ across race or ethnicity, age, disability or mental-health indicators, housing status, language access, and LGBTQ status where fields are reliable, lawful, and sufficiently powered.
primary_estimand: heterogeneity by race/ethnicity, age, disability/mental-health indicators, housing, language, and LGBTQ status
required_denominator: legally and ethically releasable group fields with adequate cell sizes
available_public_evidence: stop demographic data exist but are not the DV incident cohort
missing_fields: group fields in DV event-party records, reliability metadata, small-cell disclosure review
request_targets: law-enforcement agencies, DA, Judicial Branch, municipal courts
request_files: agency, DA, and court records requests
